---
name: Image/media misclassification
about: A photo got recolored, or an icon that should have been recolored wasn't
title: "[Image classification] "
labels: image-classification
---

**The hard guarantee this project makes**: photos and video are never altered. If a photo
got recolored, this is treated as a high-priority bug, not a minor cosmetic issue.

**Which happened?**
- [ ] A photo/photographic image got recolored/inverted (should never happen)
- [ ] A flat icon/logo that should be recolored was left untouched (safe by design, but
      annoying — the classifier defaults to "don't touch" when uncertain)

**Site / image**: (URL, or attach the image directly)

**Screenshot** (before/after if possible):

**Anything unusual about the image** (e.g. bright background, mostly one color, has
transparency, is an SVG, is very large/small):
